title: Implement Boundary Setting Game for Teens

requirements.text: Add a new 'Game' section/page to the frontend that embeds or links to the Boundary Setting Game for Teens. The game is hosted at: https://www.figma.com/make/2G9H9FkHp10em4HtzI1AXl/Boundary-Setting-Game-for-Teens?t=U3cianwoGcEygXpy-20&fullscreen=1 — embed it via an <iframe> with fullscreen support enabled (allow='fullscreen'). If iframe embedding is blocked by Figma, fall back to a prominent styled call-to-action button that opens the link in a new tab.

quotes: implement our game somewhere and make sure the link works https://www.figma.com/make/2G9H9FkHp10em4HtzI1AXl/Boundary-Setting-Game-for-Teens?t=U3cianwoGcEygXpy-20&fullscreen=1

acceptanceCriteria: A dedicated 'Play the Game' section is visible on the page.
The game iframe or link renders without broken URLs.
Clicking the link/iframe loads the Figma game at the exact URL provided.
If embedded via iframe, a fullscreen toggle button is present and functional.
If direct embed is blocked, a clearly styled 'Play Now' button opens the game URL in a new tab.

requirements.text: Add a 'Play the Game' navigation item to the sticky header so users can jump directly to the game section from anywhere on the page, consistent with the existing smooth-scroll navigation pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: The header nav includes a 'Play the Game' link.
Clicking it smoothly scrolls to the game section.
The link is styled consistently with the other nav items.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
Use the exact Figma URL provided: https://www.figma.com/make/2G9H9FkHp10em4HtzI1AXl/Boundary-Setting-Game-for-Teens?t=U3cianwoGcEygXpy-20&fullscreen=1
Preserve the existing visual design system (coral/teal/cream OKLCH palette, Nunito/Playfair Display fonts).
nonGoals: Do not rebuild or recreate the game logic locally — the game is hosted externally on Figma.
Do not change any existing sections of the advocacy site.
